response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Handled manual transcription as the reference JSON was null. 2. JSON Usage: 100% manual transcription and translation, strictly synchronized with the audio track and matching the on-screen hardcoded lyrics for spelling and pacing. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are timed to start exactly when the vocals trigger and are segmented to avoid overlapping blocks. Pauses are represented with silent gaps.

subtitles.original: 紡いでたら「一途」に変わったよ
subtitles.english: When spun, it turned into "earnest devotion".

subtitles.original: あたりさわりない
subtitles.english: Safe and harmless...

subtitles.original: 言葉じゃ 覆いきれないほどのマイ ワールド
subtitles.english: words can't cover my entire world.

subtitles.original: 明日で呼ぶ声の持ち主は
subtitles.english: The owner of the voice calling out in tomorrow

subtitles.original: 他でもないこの心だった
subtitles.english: was none other than this heart of mine.

subtitles.original: 見えないって言っているその言葉も
subtitles.english: Even those words saying you can't see it,

subtitles.original: 「言葉」だと足りないだけ
subtitles.english: simply aren't enough if they're just "words".

subtitles.original: 掴んだもの 落としたもの
subtitles.english: What I grasped, what I dropped,

subtitles.original: 転んだって立って見えた視界から
subtitles.english: from the view I saw when I stood up after falling...

subtitles.original: ロックユー！ 解き放って
subtitles.english: Rock you! Release it!

subtitles.original: フォーユー！ 響きだして
subtitles.english: For you! Resonate!

subtitles.original: 景色変えてゆく
subtitles.english: The scenery is changing...

subtitles.original: まだ遠く 遠くまで 広がった空に
subtitles.english: Towards the sky that has spread further and further away,

subtitles.original: やっと踏み出すこの一歩なんて ちっぽけだけど
subtitles.english: finally taking this step forward, though it's so small.

subtitles.original: 届かない場所へと 続いていく
subtitles.english: It continues on to unreachable places...

subtitles.original: どんな風に雨に消えない 白線を描く
subtitles.english: Drawing a white line that won't fade in any wind or rain.

subtitles.original: もっと高く 高くまで 羽ばたいていたい
subtitles.english: I want to soar higher and higher,

subtitles.original: そして彼方色で繋ぐ 地平で待ってて
subtitles.english: and then wait for me at the horizon, connected with the color of beyond.

subtitles.original: もう願いに嘘はない ここが好き！
subtitles.english: There are no more lies in my wishes. I love it here!

subtitles.original: どんな世界も瞬間も輝く アイが在るから
subtitles.english: Every world and every moment shines because love is here.

subtitles.original: 今はただ想うこと言えばいい 「愛しているよ！」
subtitles.english: Now, all I need to do is speak my thoughts: "I love you!"

subtitles.original: 澄み渡った空に白線
subtitles.english: A white line in the clear sky,

subtitles.original: 不安と期待がアンビバレント
subtitles.english: anxiety and anticipation are ambivalent.

subtitles.original: でも君はもう気づいてる
subtitles.english: But you've already noticed,

subtitles.original: もっと高く高く高く飛んでいける
subtitles.english: we can fly higher, higher, and higher!

subtitles.original: もっと
subtitles.english: More...

subtitles.original: もっと
subtitles.english: More...

subtitles.original: もっと
subtitles.english: More...

subtitles.original: もっと
subtitles.english: More...

subtitles.original: 鏡よ 教えて
subtitles.english: Mirror, mirror, tell me,

subtitles.original: 私の証は
subtitles.english: where is my proof of existence?

subtitles.original: どこにあるのだろう
subtitles.english: Where could it be?

subtitles.original: わからない わからないよ
subtitles.english: I don't know, I just don't know.

subtitles.original: 周りと比べたってさ 虚しくなるだけ
subtitles.english: Comparing myself to others only makes me feel empty,

subtitles.original: あのノイズが海鳴りのように涙を奪う
subtitles.english: that noise robs me of my tears like the roaring of the sea.

subtitles.original: 切り取った風景を道標にしよう
subtitles.english: Let's make this captured scenery our guidepost.

subtitles.original: そうだ 傷ついた感情も 連れて行くから
subtitles.english: Yes, because I'll bring even my hurt feelings along with me.

subtitles.original: そっと響くカンパネラ 新しい未来を感じてる
subtitles.english: A softly resonating Campanella, I'm feeling a new future.

subtitles.original: 怖くたって 進むしかないでしょう
subtitles.english: Even if I'm scared, there's no choice but to move forward, right?

subtitles.original: 遠くまで
subtitles.english: All the way into the distance!

subtitles.original: もっと もっと 届けこの祈りよ 光となれ
subtitles.english: More, more! Reach out, my prayer, and become light!

subtitles.original: もっと もっと 少しずつでもいい 私という答えを
subtitles.english: More, more! Even if it's little by little, the answer that is myself...

subtitles.original: もっと もっと
subtitles.english: More... more...

subtitles.original: 夜空よ 教えて
subtitles.english: Night sky, tell me,

subtitles.original: 私の証は
subtitles.english: will my proof of existence

subtitles.original: 輝けるのかな
subtitles.english: be able to shine?

subtitles.original: 見つけたい 見つけたいよ
subtitles.english: I want to find it, I really want to find it.

subtitles.original: 誰かの決めたレッテルは 苦しくなるだけ
subtitles.english: The labels decided by others only make it painful,

subtitles.original: ねえ ノイズも力に変えるよ 心に誓う
subtitles.english: hey, I'll turn even the noise into strength, I swear to my heart.

subtitles.original: 錆びついた運命の歯車を回そう
subtitles.english: Let's turn the rusted gears of fate.

subtitles.original: ほら 着飾った感情は 脱ぎ捨てるから
subtitles.english: Look, because I'll throw off these dressed-up emotions.

subtitles.original: そっと紡ぐシンフォニア 叶えたい願いを信じてる
subtitles.english: A softly spun Symphonia, I believe in the wish I want to fulfill.

subtitles.original: 胸を張って 歌うしかないでしょう 全力で
subtitles.english: With my chest held high, there's no choice but to sing, with all my might!

subtitles.original: もっと もっと やがて希望の歌に変わる日まで
subtitles.english: More, more! Until the day it eventually turns into a song of hope,

subtitles.original: もっと もっと 悩みながらでいい 全てが宝物
subtitles.english: more, more! It's okay to worry, because everything is a treasure.

subtitles.original: いつの日か この声を 受け取ってくれたなら
subtitles.english: If one day, you receive this voice of mine...

subtitles.original: この言葉を君に もう大丈夫 ひとりじゃない
subtitles.english: These words are for you: "It's okay, you're not alone anymore."

subtitles.original: 強い想いを
subtitles.english: With strong feelings...

subtitles.original: 繋ぐよ
subtitles.english: We'll connect them!

subtitles.original: 一歩踏み出してみた 優しく世界は微笑む
subtitles.english: I tried taking a step forward, and the world gently smiles.

subtitles.original: 高鳴る気持ちに 身を任せて さあ行こう保存
subtitles.english: Entrusting myself to this racing heart, let's go!
